text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day of the Uma Kids Footrace Meet,
a local community event. As academy staff and
the participants' guardians gather around to
watch the children compete...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: LET'S GO, SISTER!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The explosive shout catches me by surprise, and I
turn to see who it is.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I want you to show me your speed, power, and
overflowing Bakushin energy! Leave it all on the
field today!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Okay, Sis! I won't let you down!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh? You there, Trainer! Let me guess—you've
already caught on to my sister's potential!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You've got an eye for talent! Don't look away,
because she's going to show you her Bakushin
spirit!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Yes! Rest assured, she won't disappoint!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: She's the best sister ever! Top of her class and a great cook to boot! Mark my words—she'll make history in today's race! Gasp?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wait, that means... everyone will nominate her as
class representative! Finally! My sister! A class rep
in her own right!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
Um, I'll pass on that, actually... but I'll do my best
for the race! I'm gonna go all-out Bakushin, just
like you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
HAAA HA HA HA! That's the spirit! Run like me
and first place is surely yours!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Simply Bakushin forward with all your might, and
you'll be at the finish line before you know it!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: LET'S BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus, the much-anticipated race begins. After
hearing so much praise about Bakushin O's little
sister, she's the focus of my attention.

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff! I've gotta Bakushin... even harder!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff! Tenth... place... B-Big Sis, I'm so sorry... I couldn't run like you...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ba... Ba-ba-ba... Ba...
choice_data_list: It's too bad, but I'm sure you'll do better next—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: BAKUSHIN-TASTIC! I'M SO TOUCHED!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Sob! To think I'd get to see my baby sis fly across the turf in a race! They grow up so fast!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Your brave, dignified, incredible running was a
Bakushin straight to my heart! The tears, they
won't stop!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: B-but I came tenth... I did so poorly...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean? Tenth's amazing! The way
you gave it your all out there was so electrifying,
it set the world on fire!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Your run was more than worthy of a class rep—no,
a national rep—no, a world rep! Everyone should
follow your Bakushin example!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So don't worry. You'll win the next meet without
fail! You were more brilliant, beautiful, and
Bakushin than anyone!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: A-ahaha... You think so? Um... thanks, Sis.

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
Still... I wish my running could've been as cool as
yours...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite Sakura Bakushin O's words of
encouragement, her little sister trudges away
looking dejected.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wha?! N-n-no way! She's unhappy?! Why?!
choice_data_list: You should give her some time alone.
You should give her some time alone.

Maybe a special training session would cheer
her up!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wha?! N-n-no way! She's unhappy?! Why?!
choice_data_list: You should give her some time alone.
You should give her some time alone.

Maybe a special training session would cheer
her up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might be hard for Sakura Bakushin O to get why
her sister's feeling down. Some time alone might
be the solution.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I should?! D-does that mean... no Bakushin?
choice_data_list: It's plenty Bakushin to just watch over her!
It's plenty Bakushin to just watch over her!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I see! Truly, the art of Bakushin is deep!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we watch her little sister walk away,
knowing she'll only come out of this stronger.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense! When you're feeling down,
Bakushin gets you back up! Worries, problems,
and even tragedies—there's nothing it can't solve!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Sister of mine! Let's run back home! I'll be your
hot-blooded Bakushin personal coach!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
Sis... Yeah, you're right. Feeling down won't do
me any good!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Shoot for the stars! BAKUSHIIIN!
